seoTitle: WJCC Schools Calendar 2027-2028: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Williamsburg-James City County Schools 2027-2028 calendar with Aug 23 first day, Jun 8 last day, holidays, winter break, spring break, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Williamsburg-James City County Public Schools starts the 2027-2028 school year on August 23, 2027. Winter Break runs December 20-31, Spring Break runs April 3-7, and the last day of school is June 8, 2028. The calendar also lists CLP days, family conferences, holidays, early releases, and make-up day notes.

calendarFaqs.q: When does WJCC start school in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Monday, August 23, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is WJCC Spring Break in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, April 3 through Friday, April 7, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for WJCC in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Thursday, June 8, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When are WJCC early release days near the end of 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Grades 9-12 have early release on June 5-6, and all Pre-K-12 students have early release on June 7-8.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of school is August 23, 2027.

yearNumbers.label: Last Day
yearNumbers.detail: The last day of school is June 8, 2028.
